title: federal reserve / new york fed / household debt | Research Paper | Import Competition and Household Debt
summary: This August 2017 Federal Reserve Bank of New York Staff Report (Number 821) by Barrot, Loualiche, Plosser, and Sauvagnat analyzes the effect of import competition on household balance sheets from 2000 to 2007. Using individual consumer finance data and industry-level shipping costs to measure foreign competition exposure, the authors find that household debt increased significantly in regions with greater exposure to import competition, with a one standard deviation increase explaining 30 percent of cross-regional variation in household leverage growth.
